description: Regolith filter that generates itemAuxMap.generated.json with aux IDs for vanilla and custom items.

customStart.description: Item ID assigned to the first custom item (sorted alphabetically). When null (default), derived automatically as max(vanilla raw_id) + 1.

itemsUrl.description: URL to fetch vanilla item metadata from.

cacheMaxAgeHours.description: How long (in hours) to keep the cached vanilla items JSON before re-fetching.

outputPath.description: Output path for the generated JSON, relative to the Regolith temp directory.
